Sprint 2 Task 25: Push branch + open PR

title: Sprint 2 Task 24: Self-review + manual smoke

title: Sprint 2 Task 23: Extend cmd/api/main_test.go with Sprint 2 customer scenario

title: Sprint 2 Task 22: Run full unit + integration suite
description: Operational quality gate: run the full unit and integration test targets (make test-unit, make test-integration) and confirm everything passes on the Sprint 2 branch.

title: Sprint 2 Task 21: Wire cart into cmd/api/main.go
description: Wire the cart repo/service/handler into cmd/api/main.go (passing the shared VariantRepo) and register cart routes on the authenticated customer subrouter.

title: Sprint 2 Task 20: cart handler + routes + httptest
description: Add Gin handler and routes for cart (POST add, PATCH qty, DELETE item, GET list, DELETE clear) under authenticated customer subrouter, with httptest coverage of happy paths, qty validation, and IDOR rejection.

title: Sprint 2 Task 19: cart service + unit tests
description: Add cart service that uses VariantRepo.FindForPurchase to capture price snapshot at add-time, enforces qty range and per-user uniqueness, and exposes Add/UpdateQty/Remove/List/Clear. Unit tests with mock repos cover happy paths and all error mappings.

title: Sprint 2 Task 18: cart repo (PG) + integration tests
description: Implement CartRepo for cart_items: Add/Upsert (merge qty on existing user_id+variant_id), UpdateQty, Remove, List (joined view), Clear. Integration tests cover qty bounds 1-10, IDOR isolation, and upsert merge behaviour.

title: Sprint 2 Task 17: cart domain (types, errors, DTOs)
description: Create internal/cart/domain package: CartItem aggregate with price/currency snapshot, errors (ErrCartItemNotFound, ErrQtyOutOfRange, ErrVariantUnavailable), and Add/Update/CartView DTOs plus mappers.

title: Sprint 2 Task 16: Add VariantRepo.FindForPurchase to product module
description: Extend product VariantRepo with FindForPurchase(ctx, variantID) returning variant+price+currency for cart add flow, joining the active product to ensure it is purchasable. Add unit/integration tests covering missing and inactive cases.
close_reason: VariantRepo.FindForPurchase added at 253b217. 26/26 integration tests pass (24 existing + 2 new). Implementer adapted to internal package convention (no repo. prefix) and testPool var name.

title: Sprint 2 Task 15: Wire wishlist into cmd/api/main.go
description: Wire the wishlist repo/service/handler into cmd/api/main.go and register routes on the authenticated customer subrouter.
close_reason: Wishlist wired at 8899c03. /api/v1/me/wishlist* routes live. Phase B complete.

title: Sprint 2 Task 14: wishlist handler + routes + httptest

close_reason: Wishlist handler with list/contains/add/remove + routes at 22f5f73. Bad-UUID short-circuit smoke test passes.

title: Sprint 2 Task 13: wishlist service + unit tests
description: Add wishlist service layer enforcing existence of product, mapping repo errors to domain errors, and returning DTOs. Unit tests with mock repo cover add/remove/list happy paths and edge cases.
close_reason: Wishlist service with product-eligibility gate at 27ca4c5. fakeProductRepo implements all 10 ProductRepo methods. 3/3 unit tests pass.

title: Sprint 2 Task 12: wishlist repo (PG) + integration tests

description: Create up/down SQL migrations for customer_addresses table (label, recipient, address fields, is_default, soft-delete deleted_at) with partial unique index on (user_id) WHERE is_default AND deleted_at IS NULL. Run migrate-up and verify the partial unique index condition.
close_reason: Migration 000020 customer_addresses shipped at 034517b; partial unique index predicate (is_default AND deleted_at IS NULL) verified. Minor concerns about naming convention with Sprint 1 noted but Sprint 2 stays internally consistent.

description: Create up/down SQL migrations for wishlist_items table (user_id, product_id, added_at) with composite PK on (user_id, product_id) and index on (user_id, added_at DESC). Run migrate-up and verify schema.
close_reason: Migration 000019 wishlist_items shipped at e36d685; PK + index verified. Naming convention (suffix _idx) is internally consistent across Sprint 2 migrations.

title: Sprint 2 Task 1: Migration 000018 — cart_items
description: Create up/down SQL migrations for cart_items table (id, user_id, variant_id, qty 1-10, price_snapshot, currency_snapshot, timestamps) with unique index on (user_id, variant_id) and user_id index. Run migrate-up and verify schema on dev DB.
close_reason: Migration 000018 cart_items shipped at 870eb75; schema + indexes verified live. Minor code-review notes (redundant (user_id) index, leading file-path comment) accepted as spec-intentional / not worth amending.

title: Sprint 2 - Customer Shopping (Cart, Wishlist, Address Book)
description: Implement Sprint 2 of WearWhere shopping: UC14/15 cart, UC16 wishlist, and customer shipping-address book. Three new flat modules (cart, wishlist, customeraddr) mirroring Sprint 1's layout. Stock reservation and wishlist notifications deferred to later sprints. See spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-21-sprint-2-customer-shopping-design.md and plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-21-sprint-2-customer-shopping.md.

title: Auth: README setup guide (SMTP, Twilio, OAuth providers)
Follow-up: SoftDelete promotion race + tx-when-no-default-change in customeraddr repo
description: Code reviewer flagged at ae528b9: (1) AddressPG.Update opens a tx even when req.IsDefault is nil/false (wasteful); (2) SoftDelete promotion subquery runs outside row-level locks on candidates, so a concurrent same-user delete could leave no address promoted. Acceptable for Sprint 2 but worth tightening before production.
